inputs.label: Principal Amount
inputs.businessContext: The lump sum invested to purchase the immediate annuity.

businessContext_i18n.en: The lump sum invested to purchase the immediate annuity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Anüiteyi satın almak için yatırılan toplam tutar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der investierte Pauschalbetrag für den Kauf der sofortigen Rente.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant forfaitaire investi pour acheter la rente immédiate.
businessContext_i18n.es: La suma global invertida para comprar la anualidad inmediata.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المبلغ الإجمالي المستثمر لشراء القسط السنوي الفوري.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual interest rate or discount rate.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual interest rate or discount rate.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Beklenen yıllık faiz oranı veya iskonto oranı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'intérêt annuel attendu ou taux d'actualisation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de interés anual esperada o tasa de descuento.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل الفائدة السنوي المتوقع أو معدل الخصم.

inputs.label: Payments per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of annuity payments per year (e.g., 12 for monthly).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of annuity payments per year (e.g., 12 for monthly).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık anüite ödeme sayısı (örneğin aylık için 12).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Rentenzahlungen pro Jahr (z. B. 12 für monatlich).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de versements de rente par an (ex. 12 pour mensuel).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de pagos de anualidad por año (ej. 12 para mensual).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد دفعات القسط السنوي في السنة (مثل 12 للشهري).

inputs.label: Number of Years
inputs.businessContext: Total duration of the annuity in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total duration of the annuity in years.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée totale de la rente en années.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración total de la anualidad en años.
